title: Mizoram PSC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 25 Dental Surgeon and other Posts
description: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has declared the offcial notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 25 Dental Surgeons and GDMO Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for the MBBS and BDS can grab this chance and apply for the Mizoram PSC Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, and education details. application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
